body: Double-checking: the WHERE clause is `status = 'pending'` — that's every pending order in the table, not just Q1 ones, right? Is that intended, or should we add a created_at filter?

Good catch — technically the campaign is scoped to Q1, but our dataset only has Q1 orders in the 'pending' bucket right now (older ones have moved to shipped/delivered/cancelled). So the effective scope is the same. Shipping as-is for the campaign launch; we can tighten the WHERE clause in a followup if needed.
ack. LGTM then. Please add a rollback migration template for when the campaign ends.

First pass: grep for which migrations touched the `discount` column since the release cut on 2026-04-17. Sentry events on ORDERS-201 all carry release=2026.04.18-promo-q1, so the change must be in that release's diff.
